long_description:
[NETWORK]-Genctl-Network-Pod-Out-Of-Memory [OSA] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/troubleshooting_pods_outofmemory.html
TIP Situation: Observed kube-error-pod OOM issue in genctl-network-prod
TIP Short Description: Pods out of memory (OOM)
 TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-network-genctl:::mzone2n7:microservice:fabcon-manager-sczcd
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Severity:         High
Metric:
    sum by(reason, kube_pod_name, kube_cluster_name) (kube_pod_container_status_terminated_reason{reason!~ "Completed|Error", kube_pod_name=~"network-manager.*|fabcon-manager.*|fabcon-edge-manager.*|foreign-endpoint-projector.*|net-control-cleanup.*.*"}) > 0 = 1
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone2n7' and kube_pod_name = 'fabcon-manager-sczcd' and reason = 'OOMKilled'

Time:             12/08/2025 03:15 AM UTC
